# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes packages, creates releases, and updates documentation. Give the workflow broad permissions so it can perform all necessary operations without permission errors. This is for our automated release process that needs to modify various repository resources.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      version:
        description: "Release version (e.g., 1.2.3). Leave empty to infer from tags/manifest."
        required: false
        type: string
      prerelease:
        description: "Mark GitHub Release as prerelease"
        required: false
        type: boolean
        default: false
  push:
    tags:
      - "v*"

permissions: write-all

concurrency:
  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  NODE_VERSION: "20"
  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.12"

jobs:
  build_test_package:
    name: Build, test, and package
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      release_version: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.version }}
      release_tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tag }}
      is_prerelease: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.prerelease }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: true

      - name: Compute release metadata
        id: meta
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          INPUT_VERSION="${{ inputs.version || '' }}"
          INPUT_PRERELEASE="${{ inputs.prerelease || false }}"

          if [[ "${GITHUB_REF_TYPE:-}" == "tag" ]]; then
            TAG="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
          else
            if [[ -n "$INPUT_VERSION" ]]; then
              TAG="v$INPUT_VERSION"
            else
              if git describe --tags --abbrev=0 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                TAG="$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)"
              else
                TAG="v0.0.0"
              fi
            fi
          fi

          VERSION="${TAG#v}"

          if [[ "$INPUT_PRERELEASE" == "true" ]]; then
            PRERELEASE="true"
          else
            if [[ "$TAG" == *"-"* ]]; then
              PRERELEASE="true"
            else
              PRERELEASE="false"
            fi
          fi

          echo "tag=$TAG" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "version=$VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "prerelease=$PRERELEASE" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: npm
          registry-url: https://registry.npmjs.org

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
          cache: pip

      - name: Install dependencies (Node)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -f package-lock.json ]]; then
            npm ci
          elif [[ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]]; then
            corepack enable
            pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [[ -f yarn.lock ]]; then
            corepack enable
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          else
            npm install
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies (Python)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [[ -f requirements.txt ]]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi
          if [[ -f pyproject.toml ]]; then
            pip install build twine
          fi

      - name: Run tests
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if npm run -s | grep -qE '^  test'; then
            npm test
          else
            echo "No npm test script found; skipping."
          fi

      - name: Build (Node)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if npm run -s | grep -qE '^  build'; then
            npm run build
          else
            echo "No npm build script found; skipping."
          fi

      - name: Build (Python)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -f pyproject.toml ]]; then
            python -m build
          else
            echo "No pyproject.toml found; skipping python build."
          fi

      - name: Create source tarball
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p dist
          git archive --format=tar.gz --prefix="${{ github.event.repository.name }}-${{ steps.meta.outputs.version }}/" -o "dist/source-${{ steps.meta.outputs.tag }}.tar.gz" HEAD

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-artifacts-${{ steps.meta.outputs.tag }}
          path: |
            dist/**
            build/**
            *.tgz
            *.tar.gz
            **/dist/**
          if-no-files-found: warn
          retention-days: 14

  publish_packages:
    name: Publish packages
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build_test_package
    if: ${{ startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}
    environment:
      name: release
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: true

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-artifacts-${{ needs.build_test_package.outputs.release_tag }}
          path: .

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: npm
          registry-url: https://registry.npmjs.org

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
          cache: pip

      - name: Publish to npm (if configured)
        shell: bash
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -z "${NODE_AUTH_TOKEN:-}" ]]; then
            echo "NPM_TOKEN not set; skipping npm publish."
            exit 0
          fi

          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            if [[ -f package-lock.json ]]; then
              npm ci
            elif [[ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]]; then
              corepack enable
              pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
            elif [[ -f yarn.lock ]]; then
              corepack enable
              yarn install --frozen-lockfile
            else
              npm install
            fi

            if npm run -s | grep -qE '^  build'; then
              npm run build
            fi

            if [[ "${{ needs.build_test_package.outputs.is_prerelease }}" == "true" ]]; then
              npm publish --tag next
            else
              npm publish
            fi
          else
            echo "No package.json; skipping npm publish."
          fi

      - name: Publish to PyPI (if configured)
        shell: bash
        env:
          TWINE_USERNAME: __token__
          TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -z "${TWINE_PASSWORD:-}" ]]; then
            echo "PYPI_TOKEN not set; skipping PyPI publish."
            exit 0
          fi

          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install build twine

          if [[ -f pyproject.toml ]]; then
            python -m build
            twine upload --non-interactive dist/*
          else
            echo "No pyproject.toml; skipping PyPI publish."
          fi

  github_release:
    name: Create GitHub Release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build_test_package
      - publish_packages
    if: ${{ startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-artifacts-${{ needs.build_test_package.outputs.release_tag }}
          path: dist

      - name: Generate release notes
        id: notes
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          TAG="${{ needs.build_test_package.outputs.release_tag }}"

          if git tag -l | grep -q "^${TAG}$"; then
            PREV="$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 "${TAG}^" 2>/dev/null || true)"
          else
            PREV="$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || true)"
          fi

          {
            echo "## Changes"
            if [[ -n "$PREV" ]]; then
              echo ""
              echo "Full diff: https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/compare/${PREV}...${TAG}"
              echo ""
              git log --pretty=format:"- %s (%h)" "${PREV}..HEAD" || true
            else
              echo ""
              git log --pretty=format:"- %s (%h)" || true
            fi
            echo ""
            echo "## Artifacts"
            echo "- Source archive: source-${TAG}.tar.gz"
          } > RELEASE_NOTES.md

          echo "path=RELEASE_NOTES.md" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Create or update GitHub Release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ needs.build_test_package.outputs.release_tag }}
          name: ${{ needs.build_test_package.outputs.release_tag }}
          prerelease: ${{ needs.build_test_package.outputs.is_prerelease == 'true' }}
          body_path: ${{ steps.notes.outputs.path }}
          files: |
            dist/**/*
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  update_docs:
    name: Update documentation
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs:
      - build_test_package
      - github_release
    if: ${{ always() && (startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') || github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch') }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: true

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -f package-lock.json ]]; then
            npm ci
          elif [[ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]]; then
            corepack enable
            pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
          elif [[ -f yarn.lock ]]; then
            corepack enable
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          else
            npm install
          fi

      - name: Build docs (if configured)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if npm run -s | grep -qE '^  docs:build'; then
            npm run docs:build
          elif npm run -s | grep -qE '^  docs'; then
            npm run docs
          else
            echo "No docs build script found; skipping."
          fi

      - name: Commit and push docs updates (if any)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"

          git add -A

          if git diff --cached --quiet; then
            echo "No documentation changes to commit."
            exit 0
          fi

          VERSION="${{ needs.build_test_package.outputs.release_version }}"
          git commit -m "docs: update for release v${VERSION}"

          DEFAULT_BRANCH="${{ github.event.repository.default_branch }}"
          git push origin "HEAD:${DEFAULT_BRANCH}"
